name: Plant & Co. Brands Ltd.
summary: Plant & Co. Brands Ltd. focuses on operating data-driven digital CBD marketplace. It operates as a vertically integrated enterprise focused on the health and wellness sector. Plant & Co. Brands has collaboration with the University of Manitoba to develop an all-natural hemp-based food line. The company was formerly known as Eurolife Brands Inc. and changed its name to Plant & Co. Brands Ltd. in December 2020. Plant & Co. Brands Ltd. was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
